nasb.text: This is the inheritance of the sons of Gad according to their families, the cities and their villages.

esv.text: This is the inheritance of the people of Gad according to their clans, with their cities and villages.

cnv.text: 這就是迦得人按著家族得著的產業所包括的城鎮，和屬於這些城的村莊。

ccb.text: 以上这些城邑、村庄便是迦得支派按宗族所分到的产业。
